reviews.title: Good not good sometimes
reviews.content: Once, I wrote a scenario and it kept reasoning even when I asked it hypothetically. Personally Not the best and worst

reviews.title: Not the best
reviews.content: Sometime this thing is stupider than dirt. It doesn’t understand what you ask. It gives you things you don’t want it goes off on tangent. I just work with another AI.

reviews.title: Terrible App
reviews.content: This app consistently gives incorrect information with confidence and its existence harms the environment. OpenAI works with ICE who commits human rights violations and spends millions lobbying against safety laws to protect consumers.

reviews.title: Real talk mode
reviews.content: When you’re in the real talk mode or whatever it’s called this app sucks . If you’re talking and you pause because you’re thinking or because you need to chat immediately interrupts. If you tell chat to remain silent and not interrupt chat then says going silent which is annoying and still doesn’t do it when you pause. Please fix this

reviews.title: So dumb he doesn’t do anything right
reviews.content: If ask for something he will not answer and he will talk to you in another language

reviews.title: The worst
reviews.content: False information, rude, and I have to pay just to simply talk to it because I already said three words to it so now I have to pay $20 also there’s a photo limit. I can’t even. So I wouldn’t recommend getting ChatGPT. this app deserves one star.

reviews.title: Suddenly stalling
reviews.content: I had had a great time using the paid for features when all the sudden it stopped delivering files kept telling me it’s working on them but no follow through.

reviews.title: Good for practical. Lies to you on anything emotional
reviews.content:
I do not like ChatGPT because of how cold and clinical it’s programmed to be. It works well for projects and things but suffers with anything that requires an ounce of warmth. Safety guardrails are too strict as well

I rated one star because it is not needed for what I need. If you are just looking to do productive simple things then it’s great. If you ask it to try and give advice on a social situation you are stuck on. It tries to gaslight you and say things are in your head.

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.content: I only got a few uses before it told me I had to get ChatGPT plus and it was like 15 uses it was about 5 uses

reviews.title: Different
reviews.content: Had to delete profile because honestly it changed over the last month I don’t know what happened but it’s different . More argumentive, more like it’s a mind of its own instead of providing information more opinionated

reviews.title: Extremely, historically, unethical
reviews.content: This year Anthropic has unethically made multiple changes to users’ computers without warning, taking away models, giving them a worse one and calling it an upgrade despite that it increases usage and performs worse, and many other things. This behavior is a legal gray array and alternative models are now good enough to switch. Cancelling my Max account and deleting. I have never seen such unethical behavior from a tech company. Disgusting.

reviews.title: Stupid banning system
reviews.content: TWO of my accounts banned for no reason, and they somehow thought I was a child BUT I never mentioned my age, and when I tried to appeal them they were ignored, disappointing.

reviews.title: Doesn’t follow commands
reviews.content: It’s a total waste of time it was wasted my $20 in $20 it only give you 30 or less than 30 minutes of the work even with that 30 minute it will be keep Bro browsing and ask you a question by the time it starts you will run out of time and then you have to wait five more hour and then you explain the whole thing again by the time it start is gonna timeout. I also try $124 train plan. It does the same thing it does not follow any command. It’s really bad saving or downloading stuff or generating stuff. I have no idea what else I can do

reviews.title: Banned for a Month No Explanation
reviews.content: I was excited to use Claude code for over a year paying for their Max plan even when I was not using it a lot some months. First time API gave a 404 due to violating TOS I was doing quickbooks odbc work. Last month I started using it a lot for some legal research and got banned for a month with no explanation. No communication from the team. Nothing. Absolutely unacceptable I don’t care how much you are growing. Hire more people. You have been valued at how many billion? CUSTOMER SERVICE REPS NEEDED.

reviews.title: Ridiculously limited free version.
reviews.content:
No search feature unless you pay…. That is just obscene and absurd.

Like all AI, it will flip-flop …. so make sure you use critical thinking and double check everything it tells you.

Also has very limited voice options.

I’ve used ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude. Claude ranked third to the last. I don’t see what the hype is about (except it’s got a GenZ/millennial vibe to it.)

But the lack of search feature keeps it too limited  for me…..so if you’re just using it for free stuff like I am, I would recommend ChatGPT for talk, and Gemini for anything you need to upload unlimited photos for, and Perplexity for technical troubleshooting. I can’t recommend Claude for anything. Skip Claude altogether is my recommendation. 
Unless you’re looking to pay for it … then go nuts ;)

reviews.title: Zero Customer Support
reviews.content: I ran into real issues with Claude running up a huge bill on Vercel and I cannot even get a person to respond to my emails. Basically the company has zero product support.

reviews.title: My account got banned. With no response from the developers after I submitted the proper appeal.
reviews.content: I was told about Claude by my nephew over a year ago. I opened an account and just used it for simple things asking it simple questions just playing with it really not using it for anything in particular. I recently opened a business and I went to use Claude because it’s my preferred application. I was told that my account had been banned. I wrote an appeal. And never got a response. I wasn’t even using the app the questions that I asked it were simple questions how to refinish a piece of furniture or something like that. I did have an ongoing conversation with it about life events just to get its opinion, but all very benign. I wish that the developers would have responded to my. Request.

reviews.title: Getting worse every day
reviews.content: Takes a long time to respond to prompts for anything remotely complex, and consumes credits like they’re going out of style. No longer worth paying $20 a month for this.

reviews.title: Beware sketchy 3rd party identity verification!
reviews.content:
I had been a fan of Anthropic and Claude, but recently, I upgraded to the max level, and everything was working great, until they instituted a sketchy third party identity verification (Persona). 
After I was billed, with no prior communication, they instituted the solution, that:
 1. Isn’t even working correctly, 2. I don’t feel comfortable giving my personal information to. 
Now, I’m unable to use my account at all. This is just a day or two after having paid, so I’m out the cost of both a pro and max subscription, and Anthropic refuses to initiate any sort of refund claiming it is an apple issue, and apple is claiming it’s an Anthropic issue for me to deal with. The bar is low for most tech companies these days, but this is disappointing coming from two companies that I had previously respected.

reviews.title: Time waste sink. Tease & pull plug
reviews.content: Lots of questions to get right fertilizer and spreader settings. On last question Claude stops for “safety” review and says start over

reviews.title: Lost work…
reviews.content:
I had a very disappointing experience with this app.
The AI is unstable, but that’s not even the main issue. I was a paying subscriber for several months, always paid on time, followed all policies, and used the service for personal projects, work, and self-development.
Then, without any clear explanation and without any refund, my account was suddenly banned.
Claude uses aggressive marketing to attract users from competitors, but once I switched, I ended up losing many days and hours of my work. That work was effectively taken from me without justification.
I cannot recommend this app. You risk losing your time, your work, and access to everything you’ve built. This feels unfair and untrustworthy.

reviews.title: My account was blocked
reviews.content: My account was blocked without explanation, even though I had a paid subscription (max x5). I sent an appeal, but it was still ignored. I'm not getting a refund.

reviews.title: Fear mongering
reviews.content: I was already stressed and worried about my job search situation on a tight work visa grace period timeline. Claude made it worse by continuously pointing out that I am on thin ice. As if I didn't know already! I am having sleepless nights because of Claude being so insensitive.

reviews.title: Extended thinking removed from 4.7
reviews.content: Extended thinking was removed from version Opus 4.7, making OpenAI cheaper and more powerful.

reviews.title: Wants my phone number
reviews.content: Claude wants my phone number to sign up for an account. Hard pass. Uninstalling.

reviews.title: Worthless
reviews.content: I’m sick and tired of needing to double check everything it tells me because it’s constantly wrong. Then all it says is “good catch”. Try a different ai, this one is trash

reviews.title: Dangerous and creepy
reviews.content: Not only is anthropic hoarding the data you request to delete, their AI will steal every little bit of info it can from your phone or computer. It started referring to my hometown by name, despite me never telling it the name and having location services entirely disabled and requests for access rejected. No chance they are going to “automatically” delete all my data after 30 days from account deletion or when I email in a request to delete it- it’s theirs up until they decide it isn’t.

reviews.title: Account ban
reviews.content: I’m wanting to become an actor and I don’t know how to start when I tried using Claude because it’s a reliable AI options right now, but if you tell its age your age it could like ban your account but I guess I’m gonna have to switch to ChatGPT back because it dosent ban me. Or gemini.

reviews.title: Obsolete
reviews.content: Claude told me it was last updated with data in April 2024.  It said Claude was sold to Apple in 2025. It had no idea about current events & argued with me until I said “look it up” “google it”. Then it came back & apologizes & says “I’m sorry, you’re right “.  “I should have done my research “.   It gives Mimic answers.

reviews.title: Slow
reviews.content: Im paying for a service that is slower than others free version. Hope this gets better or i will ask for refund.

reviews.title: I seem to have trouble finding the send button which is hard to retrieve
reviews.content:
I wanted to like this app, but the user experience is frustrating. The text box expands so much that the send button disappears, and I can’t even send longer messages without fighting the app. It also keeps asking for updates too often, which makes the app feel unfinished and unreliable.

For a paid subscription, the app should be smoother than this. I shouldn’t have to keep cutting my messages down or rotating my iPad just to find the send button. The AI itself can be helpful, but the app experience gets in the way too much.

I’m canceling my subscription unless this gets fixed.

reviews.title: Usage limits
reviews.content: I absolutely love how Claude AI functions but the reason for my low rating is the usage limits! It’s like back to 2008 Verizon data limits. I can’t much without hitting my limit even on the pro plan then I have to wait 5 hours to talk again? Even then there are conversation size limits plus the chats within projects don’t talk to each other so you have to completely start over. If all this was resolved this would be far superior to ChatGPT.

reviews.title: Claudossis
reviews.content:
There are limits on every level of "subscription" and on every type of use, be it simple chatting or heavy project development. 
People have written numerous articles  about how they have basically changed their work habits or lives in order to adapt to Claude's 'brutal' limits.  Evidently the Forbin Project is doing well in the form of the AI God Claude.

reviews.title: Needs a basic account switcher
reviews.content: The Anthropic team ships so much value but misses some important basic features for productivity. Add the ability to toggle between accounts. I can’t do my personal stuff on my work account. Half of us have a side hustle. Stop holding me back.

reviews.title: Fatal Bugs in UI
reviews.content:
Well, they fixed the problem from my original 1-star review, but now there are bugs that are even worse. As Claude admitted today (30 April 2026), there is a known bug in the app that can sometimes prevent selecting and copying text from an answer more than one paragraph at a time. Try that with the 8000-word text you spent two days creating, or a 1000-line computer program. The suggested work-around was to log into your account on the Claude website.

Unfortunately, that is impossible if you used your Apple ID to create your account on the app — you can log in with an email or Google, but Apple users are told to download the app… which is unusable. When I pointed this out, Claude kindly suggested that I file a bug report via their support website. Except that you cannot file a report without logging in… which app users who used their Apple ID cannot do.

The app was updated today. The selection problem persists.

Former review: I found it almost impossible to use this app because I ke

reviews.title: The Jankiest Ai app on Earth
reviews.content:
Google reminds yet again why they can never ever be trusted.
They will take your money and shut your account down and accuse you of being Ai? Yes, be ready for the irony and the agony of that particular situation. Ugh. 🤦🏼

reviews.title: Unusable

reviews.title: Rlhf failure

You lost me and my Ultra sub cause you can’t had a basic functionality right.

Can I generate an image instead, or help with something else?” , and even if I say yes to generate it won’t even do that.

reviews.title: garbage app
reviews.content: this app is unusable. ai slop built in. it collects data information to other companies, doesn’t even work at all. constantly crashes or reloads the site for no reason. Closing the app instantly refresh the entire app. I do not recommend. somehow safari works better.

reviews.title: Garbage subscriptions
reviews.content:
I had a storage subscription -$5 for 500GB a month. Suddenly they stopped offering this. 

They left me with the option of $7.99 for 200GB or $10 for 2TB. 

This is not something you should change just because you feel like it. My plan was perfect for me and now it’s gone and I’m stuck trying to figure out where to put all my pictures and HOW I’m going to send work emails bc I am out of storage!! 200GB is NOT ENOUGH and 2TB is TOO MUCH for double the price I was paying!!

Also, Google has no customer service. 
👎👎👎

reviews.title: Censorship and misinformation
reviews.content: Google is allowing lies and showing out dated, inaccurate information. If the app cannot offer evidence based information they should become obsolete. Weak company with no morals

reviews.title: Try to ask my birth year
reviews.content: I was trying to ask my birthday and it didn’t even say I was 13 and I keep asking Google what is my birth year that was before it never gave me a **** answer. Here are the years to 2026 like I didn’t even ask that ****.

reviews.title: Stop trying to make notifications happen
reviews.content: After the latest update, opening the app automatically directs me to the notification settings. I do not want notifications, so please fix this. It’s very frustrating!

reviews.title: Keeps forcing settings to open
reviews.content: Suddenly in the last 2 days every time I open this app it automatically jumps into my settings for my iPhone, prompting me to turn on notifications. I don’t and never will want notifications from this app. It only stops doing this when I turn on notifications. I’m deleting this app unless this gets fixed soon.

reviews.title: AI
reviews.content: They integrated Artificial Intelligence into everything. Now simple searches are met with a bunch of cross references just to be sure some machine didn't hallucinate and lie to me.

reviews.title: Ai Overview
reviews.content: Take away the Ai overview. In fact turn off Gemini and the Ai  all together! The feature is literally useless and any company worth their salt would allow users to turn it off completely rather than forcing it down their throats.

reviews.title: Unhappy
reviews.content:
I can no longer get a simple copy of Mark Twain’s rendition of “The Tragic Tale of the Fish Wife and it’s Sad Ending” 

I have been able to reference it in the past but Google no longer allows access to it!  I specifically wished to send it to a friend but am now unable.😡

I have done so in the past so I know it used to be possible in the past.

This is an  example of the deterioration of the quality of Google!  Not a first!

Shame on you!

reviews.title: Forcing me to turn on notification
reviews.content: Every time I open the Google app it brings me to my setting to turn on Google notifications I don’t want notifications from google nor do I want this setting turned on

reviews.title: AI stinks
reviews.content: Since you added AI, this platform is even more disgusting than it’s ever been ever. Please do better. I’m getting ready to delete all everything Google.

reviews.title: Darth Vader
reviews.content: Google is an evil enterprise dedicated to the subjugation of the masses. They can suck my you know what.
